tracks.rawText: 3:13PinkPantheress - Stateside + Zara Larsson (Official Video) [lIxQe1R5hs0]UploadHyperpop and bubblegum bass track at 160 BPM in G major, The arrangement features a high-pitched, processed female vocal with heavy pitch correction and formant shifting, The percussion consists of a punchy, short kick drum, metallic snares, and rapid-fire hi-hat rolls, A distorted, sub-heavy synth bass provides the low end, while bright, detuned saw-wave synths and plucky arpeggios fill the mid and high frequencies, The track uses frequent rhythmic stutters, pitch slides, and sudden dynamic shifts characteristic of the genre8PublishRemix
tracks.title: PinkPantheress - Stateside + Zara Larsson (Official Video) [lIxQe1R5hs0]

tracks.rawText: 3:39Silica In My Skin (Remix)UploadSynth-rock with industrial and electronic elements, Distorted electric guitars play palm-muted eighth-note patterns in the verses and wide power chords in the choruses, A prominent analog-style synthesizer plays a staccato, arpeggiated sequence throughout, The drums feature a processed snare with a gated reverb and a heavy, compressed kick drum, A gritty synth bass follows the root notes of the guitar progression, Male vocals are processed with light distortion and doubling, shifting from a melodic, breathy delivery in the verses to a powerful, belted chest voice in the choruses, The track is in 4/4 time at 145 BPM in the key of B minor2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Silica In My Skin (Remix)
